---
title: "Ket-contamination investigation"
subtitle: "Optional subtitle"
author: "Scott S"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  powerpoint_presentation:
    reference_doc: "doc/AI Brain Science Presentation Template_custom_names.potx"
    slide_level: 2
---

```{r}
library(metap)
library(feather)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

MD = projHCT::sheets$MD
cMD = projHCT::sheets$cleanMD

HTRgenesINT = c(
  "HTR1A", "HTR1B", "HTR1D", "HTR1E", "HTR1F", "HTR2A", "HTR2B", "HTR2C", "HTR4", "HTR5A", "HTR6", "HTR7"
)
HTRgenes12 = c("HTR1A", "HTR1B", "HTR1D", "HTR1E", "HTR1F", "HTR2A", "HTR2B", "HTR2C")
HTR1 = c("HTR1A", "HTR1B", "HTR1D", "HTR1E", "HTR1F")
HTR2 = c("HTR2A", "HTR2B", "HTR2C")
HTR0 = c("HTR4", "HTR5A", "HTR6", "HTR7")

legend_guides = c(size = guide_legend(title = "% Exp"), color = guide_colorbar(title = "Avg Exp"))

range_colour = scale_colour_gradientn(colours = c("lightgrey", "blue"), limits = c(0, 10),         # min / max shown
    oob = scales::squish        # squish out-of-range values to limits
  )

brain = readRDS("~/proj5HT/data-raw/Seurat/offPipeline-Macaque_PatchSeq_excitatory.rds")
brain$grouping = ifelse(brain$subclass_Corr %in% c("L4_IT", "L6_IT", "L5/6_NP", "L6b", "L6_CT", "L6_IT_Car3"), "group64", "group235")
brain = subset(brain, subset = Cortical_area %in% c("TCx", "MCx"))
brain64 = subset(brain, subset = grouping  %in% c("group64"))
brain = subset(brain, subset = grouping  %in% c("group235"))


cMTG = readRDS("~/proj5HT/data-raw/Seurat/MacaqueMTG_10xFACs.rds")
cMTG$subclass_label = as.character(gsub(" ", "_", cMTG$subclass_label))
cMTG$grouping = ifelse(cMTG$subclass_label %in% c("L4_IT", "L6_IT", "L5/6_NP", "L6b", "L6_CT"), "group64", "group235")
cMTG64 = subset(cMTG, subset = grouping  %in% c("group64"))
cMTG = subset(cMTG, subset = grouping  %in% c("group235"))
```


## Title slide

This text becomes body content on the Title slide layout (depending on your template).


## Title and Content

This text becomes body content on the Title slide layout (depending on your template).


## Results {data-layout="Two Content_Orange"}

::: columns
::: column
Left
:::
::: column
Right
:::
:::



## Content with Caption

This text becomes body content on the Title slide layout (depending on your template).
This text becomes body content on the Title slide layout (depending on your template). 
This text becomes body content on the Title slide layout (depending on your template).



- Background
- Data
- Results
- Next steps
- Section Header


## Testing

::: columns

::: column
- Left content goes here
- Bullets etc.
:::

::: column
- Left content goes here
- Bullets etc.
:::

:::

## Content slide {data-layout="Content Picture"}

::: columns

::: column
- Left content goes here
- Bullets etc.
:::

::: column

![](figs/basicPuff/5CT_200nM/QF25.26.024.19.03.04_-_L23_IT_-_5CT_200nM_-_Bath-Way635.png)
:::

:::

## Results {data-layout="Two Content"}


::: columns

::: column
- Left content goes here
- Bullets etc.
:::

::: column

![](figs/basicPuff/5CT_200nM/QF25.26.024.19.03.04_-_L23_IT_-_5CT_200nM_-_Bath-Way635.png)
:::

:::

## 

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.dim=c(8,8)}
plot(1:10, (1:10)^2)
```
